params.coords: The span to receive the normalized variation coordinates.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.
fields.summary: Gets the current normalized variation coordinates into the provided span.

params.coords: The design-space variation coordinate values to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates in design space.

params.coords: The normalized variation coordinate values to apply, in the range [-1.0, 1.0] mapped to integers.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates in normalized space.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation to a specific named instance.

params.variations: The variation axis tag and value pairs to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation axes using the specified variation values.
Gets the current variation coordinates in normalized space.
fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinate values, or an empty array if no variation data is set.
